title: Summarization with Emphasis
scenario: Create a prompt for an LLM to generate a 5-sentence summary of a given text with a specific emphasis on a particular aspect. The LLM should identify key points related to that aspect, eliminate irrelevant information, and prioritize content that highlights the emphasized topic. The output should be a concise summary with proper grammar, syntax, and punctuation.
constraints: Must include the emphasized topic as a heading

evaluationCriteria.description: The generated summary adheres to the given constraints, including word count, tone, and inclusion of the emphasized topic as a heading.
The summary accurately captures the emphasized topic and its related key points.
The summary effectively eliminates irrelevant information and prioritizes content related to the emphasized topic.
The summary demonstrates proper use of grammar, syntax, and punctuation.
